data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Experity/
data.description: Experity has recently acquired Exdion Healthcare to enhance AI-driven revenue cycle management automation for on-demand care services. The acquisition, finalized on July 1, 2026, aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency in providing healthcare services. This move underscores Experity's commitment to innovation and advancing technology in the healthcare sector. Stay tuned for further developments as Experity continues to integrate Exdion Healthcare's expertise into its operations.

data.title: ProSight Financial Association Releases Small Business Banking Outlook
data.description: The 2026 ProSight Small Business Banking Outlook was recently published by ProSight Financial Association in Chicago. Findings were derived from a survey of 600 small business owners in the United States, indicating a predominant focus on growth amidst a slightly cautious outlook for the upcoming year. The study provides fresh perspectives on the priorities, obstacles, and banking trends within the small business sector. Despite facing a more intricate environment, businesses are striving to expand, reflecting the tempered aspirations of small business owners.

data.title: Nuventive and Acadea Partner to Connect Curriculum Strategy with Continuous Institutional Improvement
data.description: A collaborative effort has been launched to assist educational institutions in synchronizing curriculum management, strategic planning, outcomes assessment, program review, accreditation, and other processes within a cohesive platform. This initiative, established in both Pittsburgh and Idaho Falls, Idaho, on July 1, 2026, aims to streamline operations. Nuventive, the organization at the forefront of data-informed enhancement, is championing this endeavor, catering to colleges and universities seeking efficiency and alignment across various facets.

data.title: KYNDRYL TO RELEASE QUARTERLY RESULTS ON AUGUST 5, 2026
data.description: Kyndryl (NYSE: KD), a prominent enterprise technology services provider, has revealed plans to disclose its performance for the quarter concluded on June 30, 2026, marking the beginning of its fiscal year 2027. The results are slated for release on Wednesday, August 5, 2026.

data.title: Magnify Ventures Launches New Fund to Build the AI Infrastructure Layer of the Care Economy
data.description: Magnify Ventures recently revealed that Fund II, supported by Pivotal Ventures and other prominent limited partners, will be dedicated to investing in artificial intelligence infrastructure with the aim of replacing the current disjointed care systems. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on July 1, 2026. This move underscores the firm's focus on revolutionizing the care economy.

data.title: Insight to Offer Microsoft 365 E7 AI-Powered Frontier Suite to Market, Leading by Example with Its Own Enterprise-Wide Deployment
data.description: In Chandler, Arizona, Insight Enterprises, a publicly traded company listed as NASDAQ: NSIT, revealed its partnership with Microsoft to become a launch partner for Microsoft 365 E7. This suite, known as Microsoft’s Frontier Suite, integrates high-level productivity and security features along with AI specifically designed for work purposes. The platform also offers tools for managing and securing AI agents. Insight Enterprises plans to implement Microsoft’s Frontier Suite within its global enterprise, which comprises over 14,000 employees. By being one of the initial adopters of this suite, Insight will serve as a fundamental client for testing and optimizing its functionality.

data.title: BuyQ Nearly Doubles Purchasing Portfolio for Charter and Private Schools In Six Months Through CoreTrust Partnership
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, BuyQ, a prominent group purchasing organization catering to over 4,000 charter and private schools across the country, revealed the introduction of new supplier categories. This development comes shortly after being acquired by CoreTrust and has led to a significant increase in category options for charter school members within a mere six-month period. The expanded portfolio now offers schools access to a broader range of reliable supplier partners, aimed at streamlining the purchasing process, alleviating administrative challenges, cutting costs, and empowering schools to make efficient procurement decisions.

data.title: Cerity Partners Expands into Oregon After Merger with Cordant Wealth Partners
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Cerity Partners, a prominent independent wealth management and advisory firm, revealed a merger with Cordant Wealth Partners, a Registered Investment Adviser situated in Oregon. Cordant specializes in financial planning and investment management. This collaboration signifies a significant development in the financial sector, with the combined entity set to have a more substantial presence in the market.

data.title: Kaiser Permanente opens its first northern Nevada medical offices
data.description: Two out of the three planned Kaiser Permanente medical offices have been launched in Reno and Sparks, offering primary, laboratory, pharmacy, and imaging health care services. Based in California, Kaiser Permanente aims to enhance local access to integrated care.

data.title: Invesco Closed-End Funds Declare Dividends
data.description: On July 1, 2026, trustees of Invesco's closed-end funds announced dividends for shareholders. The ex-date, record date, reinvest date, and payable date are all set for 7/14/2026 and 7/31/2026 respectively. Shareholders of the listed closed-end management investment companies can expect monthly dividend payouts.

data.title: Planisware - Monthly information relating to the total number of shares and voting rights making-up the share capital - June 2026
data.description: Every month, an update is provided on the total number of shares and voting rights representing the share capital. This update includes the latest figures for the total number of shares issued by the company and the corresponding voting rights attached to those shares. These figures are crucial for shareholders and investors to stay informed about the current composition of the company's share capital. Keeping track of these numbers allows stakeholders to make well-informed decisions regarding their investments. By regularly disclosing this information, the company ensures transparency and accountability in its operations.

data.title: CenTrio Successfully Completes $485 Million Comprehensive Refinancing to Support Long-Term Growth
data.description: Houston-based company CenTrio, a prominent district energy provider, recently finalized a significant refinancing deal on July 1, 2026. The comprehensive refinancing has bolstered the company's capital structure, prolonged debt maturities, and improved financial flexibility, all aimed at facilitating sustained long-term growth. This strategic move underscores CenTrio’s commitment to optimizing its financial footing and setting the stage for continued expansion.

data.title: Regarding the sale of shares and claim rights in Zaļā Elektrība SIA
data.description: On June 30, 2026, UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos” transferred its complete shareholding in Latvian company Zaļā Elektrība SIA to its wholly-owned subsidiary UAB Sorlena. The transferred shareholding represented 50% of Zaļā Elektrība SIA's share capital and voting rights, along with claim rights from a shareholder loan. The total value of this transaction is EUR 23,962 thousand.

data.title: Real Estate Expert Teresa Liepman Explains Mortgage Pre-Approval for a Smoother Home Buying Process in HelloNation
data.description: In Texarkana, Texas on July 1, 2026, real estate expert Teresa Liepman from Better Homes and Gardens Real Estate Infinity suggests the smartest approach to reducing home-buying stress. As per HelloNation, Liepman recommends obtaining a mortgage pre-approval before initiating a house hunt.

data.title: Visual Comfort & Co. Opens New Showroom in Dallas, Texas
data.description: Visual Comfort & Co. has revealed the unveiling of its second showroom in Dallas on July 1, 2026. Spanning an impressive 4,400 square feet, the showroom is situated in the vibrant Knox neighborhood of Dallas. The new location aims to showcase the company's array of designer lighting collaborations, featuring renowned names such as Kelly Wearstler. The showroom serves as a destination for those seeking premium lighting solutions in the region.
